accurate.why: All claims accurately reflect the bill text.

states_purpose.why: Clearly states purpose is to require states to provide access to designated congressional election observers.

major_provisions_covered.why: Covers all major provisions including access requirements, restrictions, removal procedures, definitions, and conforming amendments.
